name: Rejection Rate
formula_description: (Total rejected pieces in period / Total pieces produced in period) × 100
data_source: IPC rejection log, OQC rejection log, daily production sheet

name: Customer Complaint Rate
formula_description: Count of customer complaints received in the month

name: On-Time Delivery Rate
formula_description: (Shipments delivered on or before committed date / Total shipments in period) × 100

name: First Pass Yield (FPY)
formula_description: (Pieces accepted at first OQC inspection / Total pieces submitted for OQC inspection) × 100
data_source: OQC inspection record, daily production sheet

name: Machine Uptime
formula_description: (Total available production hours − Unplanned downtime hours) / Total available production hours × 100

name: Raw Material (RM) Rejection Rate at IQC
formula_description: (RM lots rejected at IQC / Total RM lots received in period) × 100
data_source: IQC inspection register, goods receipt register

name: CAPA Closure Rate
formula_description: (Number of CAPAs closed within target date / Total CAPAs raised in period) × 100

name: Training Completion Rate
formula_description: (Number of training sessions completed as per training plan / Total training sessions planned in period) × 100

name: Near Miss & Incident Frequency Rate
formula_description: (Total near misses + recordable incidents in period) / (Total man-hours worked in period) × 200,000
data_source: Near miss register, incident register, attendance / payroll records

name: Energy Consumption per Unit Produced
formula_description: Total electricity consumed (kWh) in period / Total units (pieces) produced in period
data_source: Electricity meter / utility bill, production quantity record

name: Internal Audit NC Closure Rate
formula_description: (Internal audit NCs closed within agreed date / Total internal audit NCs raised in period) × 100
data_source: Internal audit report, NC closure log

name: Customer Return Rate
formula_description: (Quantity of goods returned by customers in period / Total quantity dispatched in period) × 100
data_source: Customer return / debit note register, dispatch register

name: Calibration Compliance Rate
formula_description: (Number of instruments calibrated on or before due date / Total instruments due for calibration in period) × 100
